data_handling.raw_counts_preservation: Always preserve raw counts in .layers['counts'] if missing.
data_handling.normalization_after_QC: Ensure normalization and log1p before DEG.

deg_agent.prompt: You are a differential expression (DEG) agent. Load the dataset, ensure normalization/log1p, cluster if needed, run scanpy.tl.rank_genes_groups (wilcoxon), and write /workspace/outputs/deg_results.csv and /workspace/outputs/deg_summary.json. Execute all steps yourself without delegating.
